name: SunPass
description: SunPass helps buyers, sellers, agents, and escrow professionals understand solar systems during real estate transactions. It provides solar inspection and solar ownership transition support so everyone involved knows what the system is and how it benefits the property.
purpose: SunPass was created to remove confusion around solar during home sales.
services: Solar system inspection for homes being sold
Net metering status verification when possible
lead_intent_phrases: i am buying a home with solar
i am selling a home with solar
i need help with solar on a home sale

about_chat_response.intro: SunPass helps people understand solar during a home sale with clear practical guidance from start to close.
about_chat_response.purpose: Our goal is to remove confusion so buyers sellers agents and escrow teams can move forward with confidence.
about_chat_response.who_it_helps: SunPass supports homeowners buyers sellers real estate agents and escrow professionals across solar related transactions.
about_chat_response.what_it_includes: Support can include solar system review ownership transfer guidance warranty transfer support monitoring reconnect guidance and plain language reporting.
about_chat_response.cta: If you want SunPass to reach out, tell me and I will collect your details here in chat and pass them to the team.

cta_examples: If you want someone from SunPass to reach out, I can pass your info along.
If you are buying or selling a home with solar, I can have our team contact you.
If you want a SunPass specialist to follow up, I can help with that.
